notes.text: This advisory aggregates security fixes for the libreoffice SRPM in CIQ LTS for Rocky Linux 9.2. It addresses 3 CVEs: CVE-2023-6185, CVE-2024-3044, CVE-2023-6186.
notes.title: Description

references.summary: Canonical URL for this CSAF document

document.title: libreoffice security update for CIQ LTS for Rocky Linux 9.2
